message:
chore(artifacts): re-run verification evidence for sections 10.4-10.6, 10.13

Updated verification evidence and summaries with fresh timestamps:

- section_10_4/bd-273: Extension Certification Levels — PASS, updated
  certification.rs file size (66324→66297 bytes, reflecting upstream
  code changes)
- section_10_5/bd-2yc: Operator Copilot Action Recommendation API — PASS,
  timestamp refresh only
- section_10_6/bd-2pw: verification re-run with updated timestamps
- section_10_13/bd-12h8: PRA-TESTS status detail updated from timeout
  message to "0 tests passed" (test execution completed but found no
  matching tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
